text:
……フォトンが、とても馴染んでる。
フォースとして、心身ともに
とても安定しているようね。

……深く考えすぎないで
流れに身を任せていいと思う。

……やり方は自由。
私も一緒に、流れに身を任せ

You have become one with the Photons.
As a Force, both your mind and body have
brought them to balance.

Don't focus on the inconsequential.
Let the Photons carry you, and simply
allow your body to react.

The options are endless.
Now come, let us both offer ourselves
to the way of the Photons.
